title: Infinite Reach Gauntlet
description: An infinite reach gauntlet to minecraft.
body: The Infinite Reach Gauntlet extends your interaction range to 1000 blocks, allowing you to interact with blocks, mechanisms, and entities from extreme distances. Simply hold the gauntlet in either your main hand or off hand to activate its power—no special controls needed. Use it to press buttons, open doors, access chests, and interact with mobs from anywhere within range.
